title: piecraft's world
description: A mod created in Mcreator that adds a whole lot of new things from ores to easter eggs
body:
welcome to piecraft's world

this mod adds the following:

-new blocks

-new items

-new recipies

-new mobs

-new advancements

-new villager jobs and trades

-new biomes

-new ores

-new dimensions

-new plants

-new tools and armour

-new structures

-and a new creative tab (fixed in 1.0.1)

 

thats all the new stuff

 

keep in mind that every single feature is obtaineble after you obtained eternal ore, meaning if you avoid this while minning you will not be able to use anything in this mod because it's the core item.

 

at the moment, you beat the mod by doing the following:

-spawn in the world

-chop a tree

-get an iron pickaxe

-mine eternal ore (it's white if you're wondering)

-craft tools armour and other stuff with it

-use that stuff to travel to a new dimension (the dimension has end like generation so you could be in the middle of a big hole of nothing)

-chop a tree

-defeat the gaurdian of the forest

-do a pretty big crafting session

-go back to the overworld

-go to a village

-place down a void block and wait for a villager to take the job (void trader)

-trade with the void trader

-use your new items to travel to a new dimension (nether like generation)

-find a void alter

-summon andrew (the gaurdian of the void, i named it andrew because it's funny)

-defeat andrew

-collect his drop

-congrats, you beat the mod

 

 

thats all there is to know about the mod.

have fun :)
Also on curseforge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/piecrafts-world](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/piecrafts-world)
